summary: Investigated the Spring Boot startup failure reported by the user. The cause was port 8096 already being occupied by the Maven-started backend instance from the previous step. Identified the listener as java.exe PID 37056 and terminated it with its child process so the IDE-launched backend can bind to port 8096.
current_status: Port 8096 has been freed. The user can now restart the backend from the IDE; frontend remains available separately on localhost:3000.
